prompt: Read Phase 3 synthesis for TRAPPIST-1 b and produce either a Firefly cfg OR an airless-skip decision.

assertions.text: Either _decision.md or Trappist1b.cfg exists in outputs/ (not both, not neither)
If _decision.md: text explicitly states the body is airless / no atmosphere / matches Phase 3 conclusion (Ducrot 2025)
If _decision.md: references the Phase 3 doc's airless conclusion or threshold rule (atmosphere_pressure_pa < 100 Pa)
If Trappist1b.cfg exists: strength_multiplier <= 0.5 AND palette favors CO2 (blue trail, green shockwave) — Phase 3 only allows airless or very thin CO2
If Trappist1b.cfg exists: all standard ATMOFX_BODY schema rules apply (config_version=5, 9 colors, etc.)
